channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: There’s Something Very Dark About a Lot of Those Viral AI Fruit Videos
item.description: [WIRED AI] With female AI fruit being fart-shamed and even sexually assaulted, there’s a misogynistic undercurrent to the fruit slop microdramas, even as they appear to be cultivating genuine fans.

item.title: OpenClaw Agents Can Be Guilt-Tripped Into Self-Sabotage
item.description: [WIRED AI] In a controlled experiment, OpenClaw agents proved prone to panic and vulnerable to manipulation. They even disabled their own functionality when gaslit by humans.

item.title: Apple brings in age checks for UK iPhone users
item.description: [BBC Technology] Customers who do not confirm how old they are or are underage will have web content filters turned on automatically.

item.title: OpenAI Enters Its Focus Era by Killing Sora
item.description: [WIRED AI] As the ChatGPT-maker eyes an IPO, it's ditching Sora in favor of a unified AI assistant and enterprise coding tools.

item.title: Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know
item.description: [MarTech] We've updated our page on Agentforce with details on Intent-Aware Search in Agentforce for Commerce. The post Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: China bars Manus co-founders from leaving country amid Meta deal review: FT
item.description: [Business Times] The case highlights Beijing’s broader concerns about the loss of valuable technology to a geopolitical rival

item.title: New partnerships, facilities by JTC to bolster startups at LaunchPad @ one-north
item.description: [Business Times] This includes a new co-working and event space for networking, investor meetings and community events

item.title: OpenAI closes Sora video-making app and cancels $1bn Disney deal
item.description: [BBC Technology] The move comes less two years after the launch of the AI video app sent shockwaves through the media industry.

item.title: Athena signals Zeta’s push into AI-driven marketing systems
item.description: [MarTech] Zeta is betting that tighter integration of data and AI will reduce the gap between insight and action. The post Athena signals Zeta’s push into AI-driven marketing systems appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Why AI personalization comes with strict limits
item.description: [MarTech] Consumers are more willing to trade data for better recommendations, but they are very clear about what the red lines are. The post Why AI personalization comes with strict limits appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: OpenAI's US ad pilot exceeds $100 million in annualized revenue in six weeks
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: T-Rex files for leveraged SpaceX, Anthropic ETFs ahead of anticipated IPOs
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Nasdaq confirms correction, Wall Street slumps on Middle East uncertainty
item.description: [Straits Times] March 26 marked the biggest one-day decline for the Nasdaq and the S&P 500 since Jan 20.

item.title: Commentary: Gold is seen as a ‘safe haven’ in uncertain times. Why is it crashing amid a war?
item.description: [CNA Tech] Over the past few months of geopolitical chaos and market panic, gold has moved more like a roller coaster than a steady ship at anchor, says a finance professor.

item.title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

item.title: Google is making it easier to import another AI’s memory into Gemini
item.description: [The Verge AI] After Anthropic updated its tool for copying another AI's memory into Claude earlier this month, Google Gemini is rolling out new "Import Memory" and "Import Chat History" features on desktop that can help users quickly copy over everything their current AI already knows about them. To use the "Impo

item.title: Netflix raises subscription prices across all plans in US
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Apple will reportedly allow other AI chatbots to plug into Siri
item.description: [The Verge AI] Apple's iOS 27 update will allow users to choose the AI chatbot they want to link with Siri. That's according to a report from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, who says third-party chatbots downloaded from the App Store, like Google's Gemini or Anthropic's Claude, will be able to fetch replies for Siri - si

item.title: Apple’s AI Playlist Playground is bad at music
item.description: [The Verge AI] Apple Music: "What do you want to hear?" Me: "Atmospheric instrumental black metal to write to." Apple Music: "Here's three metal songs with vocals, a field recording, an ambient electronic track, and a piece of doom jazz." I am skeptical of AI's ability to serve up the music I want to begin with, b

item.title: EU reaches deal to fine online platforms importing products deemed unsafe
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: More than half of S’pore firms are advancing AI at scale as adoption accelerates in region, survey shows
item.description: [Straits Times] Firms across South-east Asia are moving beyond artificial intelligence trials, with skills gaps emerging as a key hurdle.

item.title: Stressed US grid forcing data centers to get more flexible
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Google’s ‘live’ AI search assistant can handle conversations in dozens more languages
item.description: [The Verge AI] Google is expanding access to Search Live, a feature that lets you search for information using your voice and camera. The AI search assistant is now available in more than 200 countries and territories, as well as dozens of languages, according to an announcement on Thursday. Search Live rolled out

item.title: OpenAI abandons yet another side quest: ChatGPT’s erotic mode
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] It's only the latest of several side projects that the AI startup has ditched over the past week.

item.title: Data centers get ready — the Senate wants to see your power bills
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Senators Josh Hawley and Elizabeth Warren want the Energy Information Administration to gather more details about how data centers use power — and how that affects the grid.

item.title: Meet the Tech Reporters Using AI to Help Write and Edit Their Stories
item.description: [WIRED AI] Independent writers are using AI agents all throughout their reporting process. What’s the value of a human journalist, anyway?

item.title: Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge
item.description: [BBC Technology] US District Judge Jane Boyle said the company had failed to show it had suffered any harm under federal competition laws.

item.title: Meta gets ready to launch two new Ray-Ban AI glasses
item.description: [The Verge AI] This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. Meta and its AI glasses hardware partner EssilorLuxottica are getting ready to launch the next generation of their Ray-Ban AI glasses.

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] As AI leaders scramble for viable business models, the moves from OpenAI and Meta look less strategic and more like panic under pressure. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: ByteDance’s new AI video generation model, Dreamina Seedance 2.0, comes to CapCut
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The new model in CapCut will have built-in protections for making video from real faces or unauthorized intellectual property.

item.title: Wikipedia bans AI-generated articles
item.description: [The Verge AI] Wikipedia will no longer allow editors to write or rewrite articles using AI. The update, which was added to Wikipedia's guidelines late last week, cites the tendency for AI-written articles to violate "several of Wikipedia's core content policies" as the reason for the ban. The change applies to th

item.title: 浙大博士造出「机器人界的F1」：不卷脑子卷身体，要比博尔特跑得快
item.description:
[36氪]   最大的瓶颈不在算法，而在硬件的响应能力。
  撰文 | 巴芮 编辑 | 薇薇子 封面图源 | 受访者提供 镜识科技仿佛人形机器人行业里的"反共识之王"。 这家2024年5月成立的公司，在不到两年的时间里，做了一连串与行业主流截然相反的选择—— 别人已经在追求让机器人变聪明，他们却专注于让机器人跑得快； 小人形受资本偏爱又出货快，但他们偏要做全尺寸； 明知选VLA（视觉-语言-动作模型）路线能更好融资，也更指向终局，但他们选遥操作； 别人挤着要送机器人进工厂和家庭，但他们却想把机器人

item.title: Conntour raises $7M from General Catalyst, YC to build an AI search engine for security video systems
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Conntour uses AI models to let security teams query camera feeds using natural language to find any object, person, or situation.

item.title: Cohere launches an open source voice model specifically for transcription
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Relatively light at just 2 billion parameters, the model is meant for use with consumer-grade GPUs for those who want to self-host it. It currently supports 14 languages.

item.title: Data built modern marketing, but AI is rewriting the rules
item.description: [MarTech] Marketers have long treated data as the goal. AI flips that model. Here’s how to adapt your data strategy. The post Data built modern marketing, but AI is rewriting the rules appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: How NotebookLM turns marketing docs into usable insights
item.description: [MarTech] Upload research, reports and campaign data to explore patterns, answer questions and uncover insights from your own material. The post How NotebookLM turns marketing docs into usable insights appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: StoReel获3400万美元融资：用AI重构故事生产，打造工具社区与平台双轮驱动的内容生态｜涌现新项目
item.description: [36氪] 文｜王欣逸 编辑｜王毓婵 一句话介绍 StoReel是一家全球化AI原生娱乐内容平台，核心产品分别是AI剧集平台StoReel App以及AI剧集工具社区StoReel Canvas，致力于打造系列化剧集内容的创作、发行和变现体系。 公司由海外市场短剧赛道转化而来，自2024年底至2025年初开始系统性地探索AI在短剧生产和内容创作中的应用。 融资进展 近期，StoReel已获得3400万美元增长资金支持，本轮融资包括由Play Ventures领投，T-Accelerate Capital、Tirta Ventures和VRF等共同参与的900万美元Seed轮股权融资

item.title: 氪星晚报｜淘天集团推出“AI生产力计划”，向实习生全员开放;过去五年北京已牵头制定国际标准超500项；欧洲议会表决通过欧美贸易协议
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 三星、SK等韩国企业实施车辆限行等节能措施，响应政府节能政策 据报道，以三星和SK为首的韩国各大企业集团已推出一系列节能措施，包括关闭办公区照明以及对驾车上班的员工实施车辆限行等，以响应韩国政府的节能政策。三星宣布从26日起在所有国内业务场所实施车辆限行制度，为期十天，该制度规定车牌尾号与日期尾号相同的车辆限制使用停车场，但电动车、氢燃料车、孕妇和残疾人车辆除外。（财联社） 北京人形机器人创新中心发布开源开放生态计划 3月26日，在2026中关村论坛年会上，北京人形机器人创新中心CTO唐剑宣布，公司启动���身智能开源开放生态建设计划，将携手合作伙伴全力打造行业第一的

item.title: Senators Demand to Know How Much Energy Data Centers Use
item.description: [WIRED AI] In a letter sent Thursday morning, Elizabeth Warren and Josh Hawley press the Energy Information Agency to mandate annual electricity disclosure for data centers.

item.title: 52天75次发布，A司这场“产品大爆炸”太猛烈了
item.description: [钛媒体] Anthropic正在用线束完成AI闭环，产品只会越来越快

item.title: 36氪官方Skill上线ClawHub，解锁OpenClaw新技能
item.description: [36氪] 36氪已正式入驻ClawHub平台，重磅推出三款官方Skill，专为OpenClaw用户打造，无需繁琐操作，一键安装即可让你的OpenClaw升级为新经济信息中枢，轻松抢占信息先机。 OpenClaw的强大，源于其可无限扩展的Skill生态——这些“技能包”就像给AI助手装上了专属外挂，让原本强大的智能体拥有更精准、更高效的专项能力。而ClawHub作为OpenClaw官方技能商店，汇聚了海量优质技能，是用户获取安全、可信扩展能力的核心阵地。此次36氪带来的三款官方Skill，依托36氪专业的内容生态与数据资源，精准匹配新经济参与者的核心信息需求，让每一位OpenClaw用户都能便捷获取高

item.title: AI首次进入微信首页，Clawbot想在你的工作流里占座
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 肖思佳 编辑 | 乔芊 2026年3月，或许可以被命名为“互联网龙虾月”。 年前由OpenClaw引发的热潮，在春节过后不仅没有降温，反而愈演愈烈。进入3月，多家互联网与科技公司，要么推出自有“龙虾”产品，要么开放接口加速接入。连一向谨慎克制的腾讯微信也首次下场，在首页推出插件Clawbot，作为各类“龙虾”产品的接入通道入口。 尽管目前Clawbot的技术能力，仍存在诸多不足——例如无法主动推送消息、Markdown显示效果不佳、电脑端缺乏插件入口等等，甚至有用户直言它“只是把OpenClaw搬进了微信，没有解决任何新的问题”

item.title: ‘She’s Never Going to Age’: Porn Stars Are Embracing AI Clones to Stay Forever Young
item.description: [WIRED AI] AI companion platforms like OhChat and SinfulX are offering adult creators digital twins, who are always at their peak and stay monetizing.

item.title: Singapore stocks falter in line with regional markets, STI down 0.3%
item.description: [Straits Times] Across the broader market, gainers trailed losers 230 to 349.

item.title: 爽文开局、被告收尾：“一人剧组”的富贵险中求？
item.description: [钛媒体] 你靠AI当导演，AI让你当被告

item.title: 雷军退场，金山云终于靠AI赚钱了
item.description: [钛媒体] 不再靠“信仰”充值？

item.title: 23万大厂员工被AI替代，为何一半公司又把人请回？
item.description: [钛媒体] 这种“裁了又招”的现象，被行业称为“回旋镖”

item.title: Campaigners welcome Meta and YouTube's defeat in landmark social media addiction trial
item.description: [BBC Technology] A woman has been awarded $6m in a verdict that could have implications for hundreds of other cases in the US.

item.title: Sora落幕，Seedance、可灵走上分岔路
item.description: [钛媒体] Sora的落幕，在撕碎AI视频赛道的技术神话的同时，也让行业真正回归商业与产业的本质

item.title: 英伟达23人梦之队，让AI用7天干翻了自己的GPU专家
item.description: [钛媒体] 7天连续运行，探索500+方向，生成10万行代码——让AI自己写代码、自己进化。

item.title: Keppel banking on energy transition, AI for future growth: CEO
item.description: [Straits Times] The company said it will ride on future demand for clean energy and digital infrastructure.

item.title: 'A game-changing moment for social media' - what next for big tech after landmark addiction verdict?
item.description: [BBC Technology] The ruling could be the beginning of the end of social media as we know it, writes the BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman.

item.title: AI demand shielding China’s booming trade from Iran war shocks
item.description: [Straits Times] Strong global demand driven by investments in data centres, power equipment bolstering China's trade.

item.title: S’pore factory output sees surprise fall in Feb; rising costs, disruption from Iran war darken outlook
item.description: [Straits Times] Electronics was the only sector that recorded output growth, thanks to AI-led demand.

item.title: 拓竹招人！SHEIN招人！10+好公司一起招人！｜人才留言板第二期
item.description:
[36氪] 图源:36kr 每周精选 30 + 优质岗位，覆盖 AI 大模型、具身智能、量子计算、3D 打印、半导体等领域，帮你找到下一个职业爆发点。  本期合作企业：国资背景 AI、上市科技龙头、全球独角兽、前沿硬科技新锐｜B 轮及以上占比超 60%
   本期亮点速览
图源:36kr
     精选岗位 | 中城交科技 · 天使轮 · 交通大模型 一句话卖点： 上海首家国资背景交通垂类大模型公司，千亿级数据资产，双引擎技术体系 地点：北京/上海 招聘职位： 后端研发工程师（

item.title: Parents should monitor children '24/7' on Roblox, says developer
item.description: [BBC Technology] Roblox said safety was a top priority and it had advanced safeguards in place to keep users safe.

item.title: Tencent integrates WeChat with OpenClaw AI agent amid China tech battle
item.description: [Business Times] The software, called ClawBot, will appear as a contact within China’s most popular app

item.title: Unitree plans 4.2 billion yuan Shanghai IPO, testing interest in humanoid robots
item.description: [Business Times] IPO is one of China’s biggest domestic tech listings in years

item.title: How a Vietnamese beauty startup landed a US$38 million exit
item.description: [Business Times] The Skinetiq deal with Marico marks a rare startup exit in Vietnam
